Operation 'HealthController_check' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, unclear_purpose. Operation has no summary or description. Added clear, actionable summary indicating health check purpose. Description explains what the operation does, that it requires no auth, and its use case for monitoring.

data.description_suggestion: Verifies that the Funnelytics Event Processor API is operational and responsive. Returns a health status indicating service availability. No authentication required. Use this endpoint to monitor API uptime and connectivity.
data.reasoning: Operation has no summary or description. Added clear, actionable summary indicating health check purpose. Description explains what the operation does, that it requires no auth, and its use case for monitoring.

message: Operation 'MetricsController_getDashboardMetrics' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Missing summary and description. Added actionable summary. Description explains the operation's purpose, required authentication headers (per API context), expected outputs, and parameter support for filtering to aid AI agent decision-making.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves aggregated event processing metrics and analytics for a specified workspace. Requires X-API-KEY and X-PROJECT-ID headers for authentication. Returns dashboard metrics including event counts, processing statistics, and performance data. Supports filtering by date range and metric type via query parameters.
data.reasoning: Missing summary and description. Added actionable summary. Description explains the operation's purpose, required authentication headers (per API context), expected outputs, and parameter support for filtering to aid AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'StandardController_postStandardWebhook' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Missing summary and description. Added clear action-oriented summary. Description includes required headers per API context, explains input structure (session, email, purchase_data per API rules), optional dateTime parameter, return value, and side effects of event processing for complete AI agent understanding.

data.summary_suggestion: Send event data to standard webhook
data.description_suggestion: Processes and sends event data to a standard webhook endpoint. Accepts event data including session ID, email, and optional purchase_data array for multiple purchases. Requires X-API-KEY, X-PROJECT-ID headers, and Content-Type header. Supports optional dateTime parameter in ISO-8601 format to specify event timestamp. Returns confirmation of event processing. Side effect: Event data is recorded and processed through the funnel pipeline.
data.reasoning: Missing summary and description. Added clear action-oriented summary. Description includes required headers per API context, explains input structure (session, email, purchase_data per API rules), optional dateTime parameter, return value, and side effects of event processing for complete AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'IntegrationController_getZapierMe' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details. Missing summary and description. Added actionable summary indicating Zapier-specific context. Description explains authentication requirements, return value, and use case for verifying integration status to help AI agents understand when to invoke this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the authenticated Zapier user's profile information and integration details. Requires X-API-KEY and X-PROJECT-ID headers for authentication. Returns the current Zapier user profile including account details and integration status. Use this to verify Zapier integration connectivity and retrieve user-specific configuration.
data.reasoning: Missing summary and description. Added actionable summary indicating Zapier-specific context. Description explains authentication requirements, return value, and use case for verifying integration status to help AI agents understand when to invoke this operation.

Distinguishes from standard webhook by mentioning integration-specific routing.

data.summary_suggestion: Send event data to integration webhook
data.description_suggestion: Processes and sends event data to a specified integration webhook endpoint. Accepts event data including session ID, email, and optional purchase_data array for multiple purchases. Requires X-API-KEY, X-PROJECT-ID, and Content-Type headers. Supports optional dateTime parameter in ISO-8601 format. Returns confirmation of event processing. Side effect: Event data is recorded and routed through the specified integration pipeline.
data.reasoning: Missing summary and description. Added clear action-oriented summary. message: Operation 'FacebookAdsController_getAllAds' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Missing summary and description. Added clear, domain-specific summary. Description explains authentication requirements, return value (list of ads with details), and prerequisite of active integration configuration to help AI agents understand dependencies and expected outputs.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all Facebook Ads campaign data
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all Facebook Ads campaigns and their associated data from the connected Facebook Ads account. Requires X-API-KEY and X-PROJECT-ID headers for authentication. Returns a list of all ads including campaign details, performance metrics, and status information. Requires active Facebook Ads integration configuration.
data.reasoning: Missing summary and description. Added clear, domain-specific summary. Description explains authentication requirements, return value (list of ads with details), and prerequisite of active integration configuration to help AI agents understand dependencies and expected outputs.
